questions.question: How many digital banking units will be established as part of the budget 2022 mandate?
questions.explanation: 75 Digital Banking Units would be set up by the government, as announced in the budget 2022.

questions.question: Which company’s sluggish IPO has resulted in a loss of nearly Rs 50,000 crore to investors?
questions.explanation: Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) shares made a lacklustre start on the stock exchanges, trading at a discount to the initial public offering price. The shares of the insurance behemoth began trading on the BSE and NSE at Rs 872 per share, down 8.11 percent from the IPO price of Rs 949 per share. The stocks fell despite the fact that the Sensex and Nifty were in the green.

questions.question: Which company recently acquired the UAE T20 cricket league franchise?
questions.explanation: Adani SportsLine, a part of the Adani Group, has acquired a franchise in the United Arab Emirates (UAE)’s flagship T20, league. It becomes the fourth Indian group to acquire it. The tournament consists of six teams and a total of 34 matches to be played.

questions.question: Which of the following life insurance companies recently announced the launch of “Bima Ratna” – a non-linked, non-participating, individual, savings life insurance plan?
questions.explanation: The Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC), India’s largest insurer, has launched “Bima Ratna” – a non-linked, non-participating, individual, savings life insurance plan. The new plan, which is aimed at the domestic market, provides both protection and savings.

questions.question: Which state government won the second place honour at the 2022 National MSME Awards?
questions.explanation: The Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) Department, Government of Odisha has been awarded first prize in the category “National MSME Award 2022 to States/UTs for outstanding contribution in the promotion and Development of MSME Sector”. Bihar and Haryana were second and third respectively.

questions.question: Which of the following banks has a corporate agency arrangement with Shriram General Insurance?
questions.explanation: Private sector lender City Union Bank (CUB) has signed a corporate agency agreement with Shriram General Insurance to distribute the latter’s insurance products through its network of branches across the country.

questions.question: Which bank’s merger with HDFC Ltd recently got Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority(PFRDA) approval?
questions.explanation: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority(PFRDA) has granted approval for the merger of HDFC Ltd. with HDFC bank. HDFC bank on April 4 agreed to take over the biggest domestic mortgage lender in a deal valued at $40 billion. PFRDA granted approval for change in status/constitution pursuant to the scheme in accordance with the PFRDA Regulations, 2018.

questions.question: Which state government will start purchasing cow faeces in order to create biopesticides and biofertilizers as part of the Godhan Nyay Yojana?
questions.explanation: Chhattisgarh government to buy cow urine from farmers at Gauthan centers for Rs 4 per liter under ‘Godhan Nyay Yojana’ from local festival ‘Hareli’ on July 28.

questions.question: Who was appointed to serve as the next managing director of ONGC Videsh Limited?
questions.explanation: Rajarshi Gupta has taken over as Managing Director of ONGC Videsh Ltd (OVL), the overseas investment arm of state-owned Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC).

questions.question: Which of the following organizations has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with the Bihar State Skill Development Mission to build a supply-chain operations skill pool by July 2022?
questions.explanation: Flipkart, the Indian e-commerce marketplace, has entered into an agreement with the Bihar State Skill Development Mission to help create a pool of skilled supply-chain operations talent via the Supply Chain Operations Academy (SCOA) in the state.
